verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.27.6 commit containing task lifecycle accounting, two-stage material delivery labor, corrected economic metrics, year-aware resource flow queries, the real Chromium mobile smoke test, CI wiring and world-save app version; later README, ROADMAP, CODEX and manifest commits may follow it.
